scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -w @ghcordeiro/sdd --no-git-tag-version && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./packages/cli/package.json').version") && git add packages/cli/package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "chore(release): bump @ghcordeiro/sdd para ${VERSION}" && git push origin main && git tag v${VERSION} && git push origin v${VERSION}
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -w @ghcordeiro/sdd --no-git-tag-version && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./packages/cli/package.json').version") && git add packages/cli/package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "chore(release): bump @ghcordeiro/sdd para ${VERSION}" && git push origin main && git tag v${VERSION} && git push origin v${VERSION}
scripts.release:major: npm version major -w @ghcordeiro/sdd --no-git-tag-version && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./packages/cli/package.json').version") && git add packages/cli/package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "chore(release): bump @ghcordeiro/sdd para ${VERSION}" && git push origin main && git tag v${VERSION} && git push origin v${VERSION}
